basic_details.job_title: AYCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Manager, Assistant Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Manager / Assistant Officer GR II (Sales) / Addl. Officer GR II
basic_details.short_information: Andrew Yule & Company (AYCL) Assistant Manager / Assistant Officer GR II (Sales) / Addl. Officer GR II Notification 2026 has been released on 04 July 2026 on the official website andrewyule.com. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the AYCL Assistant Manager / Assistant Officer GR II (Sales) / Addl. Officer GR II Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Plantation Management / Engineering / Agriculture / Bio-Science / Science / Arts / Commerce Preferably with post-graduate Degree / Diploma (2 years) in HR / Personnel Management / Graduate Degree / Diploma in Management / Agriculture Science, Diploma in Marketing/Material Management / Engineering / BBA / Graduate in Arts/Science/ Commerce, Diploma in Engineering / Graduate Degree in Science / Commerce / Management / Bio Science / Plantation
qualification.details: Assistant Manager, Tea Garden: Graduate in Plantation Management / Engineering / Agriculture / Bio-Science / Science / Arts / Commerce Preferably with post-graduate Degree / Diploma (2 years) in HR / Personnel Management / Graduate Degree / Diploma in Management / Agriculture Science. Assistant Officer GR II (Sales): Diploma in Marketing/Material Management / Engineering / BBA / Graduate in Arts/Science/ Commerce. Addl. Officer GR II: Diploma in Engineering / Graduate Degree in Science / Commerce / Management / Bio Science / Plantation.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 0.77 lakh per month, Rs. 0.40 lakh per month, Rs. 0.57 lakh per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AYCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AYCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AYCL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AYCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AYCL Tea Gardens Job 2026 Notification PDF Download AYCL Asst. Officer GR. II Job 2026 Notification PDF Download AYCL Asst. Manager, Tea GardenJob 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AYCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AYCL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by AYCL?
faq.answer: Andrew Yule & Company (AYCL) has announced a total of 9 vacancies for the posts of Assistant Manager, Assistant Officer GR II (Sales), and Addl. Officer GR II.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the AYCL Recruitment 2026 is 26th July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for AYCL Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the AYCL Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from a Graduate degree in various fields like Plantation Management, Engineering, Agriculture, Science, Arts, Commerce to specific Diplomas in Marketing, Management, or Engineering.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Manager, Tea Garden post is Rs. 0.77 lakh per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AYCL Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Kolkata, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised under AYCL Recruitment 2026 are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside West Bengal apply?
faq.answer: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible candidates in West Bengal. It is advisable to check the official notification for detailed eligibility regarding domicile.
